title: Project Planning & GitHub Hygiene
items: Broke down M2 waypoints epic (#9) into 5 atomic sub-issues (#33–#37) with DoD and layer labels
Broke down M2 production queue epic (#10) into 6 atomic sub-issues (#39–#44) with DoD and layer labels
Broke down M3 .x1 serializer epic (#11) into 4 atomic sub-issues (#45–#48) with DoD and layer labels
Broke down M3 turn loop epic (#12) into 5 atomic sub-issues (#49–#53) with DoD and layer labels
Created 7 layer labels: layer:ui, layer:api, layer:test, layer:binary, layer:docs, layer:state, blocked
Applied layer labels to all 24 issues so parallel-safe tasks are identifiable at a glance
Wired 'Blocked by / Blocks' dependency chains into every sub-issue body
Marked MA0–MA3 milestones as [SECONDARY], M2–M3 as [PRIMARY] in milestone descriptions
Added all 20 new sub-issues to GitHub Project board #1 (48 items total)
Added live changelog modal: refreshes game state and shows this summary on each deploy
